title: Gauhati High Court reserves order on Pawan Khera's anticipatory bail in Assam Police FIR
description: The Gauhati High Court on Tuesday reserved its decision on Congress leader Pawan Khera's plea for anticipatory bail in the case recently registered against him by the Crime Branch of Assam Police in Guwahati.Justice Parthivjyoti Saikia heard the plea today. The order is likely to be announced today or tomorrow.ustice Parthivjyoti Saikia A criminal case alleging defamation, forgery and criminal conspiracy was recently registered against Khera.The case was registered following his recent claims th
